mapper.sql: asu.id, asu.interval, asu.run_time, asu.stage_flag, asu.create_time, asu.create_by, asu.update_time, asu.update_by, asu.calculation , asu.attribute1 , asu.attribute2 , asu.attribute3

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.interval as ${tAlias}_interval, ${tAlias}.run_time as ${tAlias}_run_time, ${tAlias}.stage_flag as ${tAlias}_stage_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by , ${tAlias}.calculation as ${tAlias}_calculation , ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1 , ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2 , ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3
mapper.update: update ac_set_up set interval = #{interval,jdbcType=INTEGER}, run_time = #{runTime,jdbcType=TIME}, stage_flag = #{stageFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, calculation = #{calculation,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select top 1 * from ac_set_up order by id desc
